questions.question: A software project aims to develop a system for managing hospital patient information. What type of requirement is the following statement: 'The system shall display the patient's name, age, and admission date in the patient details page.'?
questions.explanation: This statement specifies what the system should do, which is a functional requirement.

questions.question: A software project for e-commerce website requires a database to store customer information. What type of requirement is the following statement: 'The database should be able to store at least 10,000 customer records without any errors.'?
questions.explanation: This statement specifies a limit on the database's capacity, which is a nonfunctional requirement.

questions.question: A software project for a banking system requires the system to process transactions within 2 seconds. What type of requirement is the following statement: 'The system shall respond to user input within 2 seconds.'?
questions.explanation: This statement specifies a time limit for the system's response, which is a nonfunctional requirement.

questions.question: A software project for a healthcare system requires the system to be accessible from any device. What type of requirement is the following statement: 'The system shall be accessible from any device, including desktops, laptops, tablets, and smartphones.'?
questions.explanation: This statement specifies what the system should be able to do, which is a functional requirement.

questions.question: A software project for an online shopping platform requires the system to handle a minimum of 500 transactions per hour. What type of requirement is the following statement: 'The system shall handle a minimum of 500 transactions per hour without any errors.'?
questions.explanation: This statement specifies a limit on the system's performance, which is a nonfunctional requirement.
